title: presla limosa
intro: Presla limosa, commonly known as Soursop, is a tropical plant native to the Americas, belonging to the Annonaceae family. The plant has been used for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. Presla limosa's therapeutic actions include analgesic, anti-cancer, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Its bioactive constituents include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including the isolation of acetogenins with potential anti-cancer activity.
